title: poa trivialis f. multiflora
intro: Poa trivialis f. multiflora, also known as the multiflorous poa or blue grass, is a rare variety of grass that belongs to the Poa trivialis species. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa trivialis f. multiflora include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
